# API Design Rules

> Extends [root AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Auto-loaded when editing `*.controller.ts`, `dto/*.ts`, service clients, or API contract docs.

## Always

- Use `InternalRequest` or `InternalRequestAsync` from `@platform-core/base-service` for inter-service HTTP calls. [MUST]
- Pass `SERVICE_NAME`, `source`, `sourceId`, and `version` on inter-service calls for routing and audit logs. [MUST]
- Add explicit pagination to list endpoints that can exceed platform safe limits. [SHOULD]
- Add `@Tier(...)` from `@platform-core/middlewares` on NestJS controllers or handlers. [SHOULD]

## Never

- Never use raw `axios`, `fetch`, or direct service URLs for internal service-to-service calls. [MUST]
- Never include the service prefix in `InternalRequest.route`; pass the route relative to the target service. [MUST]
- Never ship unbounded list endpoints when result sets can grow large. [SHOULD]

## Prefer

- Prefer typed query DTOs for pagination and filters over ad hoc `req.query` parsing.
- Prefer cursor or explicit `page`/`limit` contracts over implicit "return everything" list endpoints.
- Prefer controller-level `@Tier` when most routes share the same tier and override only exceptions.

## Verify

- Confirm internal calls use `@platform-core/base-service`, not raw HTTP clients.
- Confirm new list endpoints document and validate pagination parameters.
- Confirm new NestJS handlers declare `@Tier` at the class or method level.

## References

- [internal-service-communication](references/internal-service-communication.md) — base-service, ISTIO_MESH, audit headers
- [list-endpoint-pagination](references/list-endpoint-pagination.md) — pagination contract guidance
- [api-tiering](references/api-tiering.md) — `@Tier` decorator and metrics integration
